lines.text: I'll take it from here. Greetings, esteemed guest. I am Phoebe, an Acolyte of the Order.

The city of Ragunna welcomes your arrival. Many visitors are here for the upcoming Carnevale. To ensure everyone enjoys the festival safely, the Order has tightened the customs procedures and added new regulations...
Some information might be overlooked on your declaration form. Please accept our apologies.
Thank you for your understanding. Please follow me.
Certainly. Please follow me.
Yes. Most newcomers to the city are amazed by the spectacle.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: ...Hmm?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Ah! Hello, I'm Phoebe! Nice to meet you, too.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Ah...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Yes, thanks to the Sentinel's blessing, most of the Common Echoes in Rinascita are friendly and approachable.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: It's not that... Members of the Order are instructed to maintain a distance from Echoes. We must stay objective to better share knowledge about them and honor our duty to inform the public.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: That Echo we saw is known as a Hocus Pocus. Children love its tricks, and they say that if an adult gets its gift, they can relive their happiest memories in dreams... ah...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: ...Sorry, I got carried away.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: ...Yes. Allow me to introduce to you the Nexus of Ragunna, also known as the Genesis Nexus.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Yes, but the Ragunnesi prefer to call it the Genesis Nexus.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Input your personal information into the Nexus, and you'll be able to use all Common Echoes in the city just like a regular citizen.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Please place your terminal here.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Livia, Brenno! Any sign of Beppe?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Strange, where could Beppe be...?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Oh... Cut it out, Brenno! Stop that...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Wait, Brenno's right here. Then who's poking me in the back? Beppe, you better have a good expla—
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Eek!
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Oh, it's you. Pardon me, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I thought you were at Ragunna City. Didn't expect to meet you here. Oh, uhh... Sorry, I don't think we've met.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I don't think we've met before.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The Echo incident... Yes, I've also heard of it. I even heard you were caught right in the middle of it, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Please accept my apologies on behalf of the Order.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: By the way, have any of you seen an Echo named Beppe? They're about this tall and usually wander around here, but I can't seem to find them anywhere...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The Order has also received reports of missing Echoes in this area. Is it possible that the Fisalia family is involved? I find it really hard to believe.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: From what I know, the Fisalia family is deeply respectful of the Divinity. How could they commit such a blasphemous act? The Echoes are gifts from the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: A petal? The ritual one? No, wait... this frequency...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Oh, right! I think I saw this flower in the Cathedral of Mercury, and Priest Alessio was wearing it. Wait... Could he be involved with the Fisalia family's plans?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Imperator granted us Echoes, the skies, lands, oceans, and sustenance. To which we should all be grateful and reverent.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I request to join your investigation, {PlayerName}. As a servant of the Sentinel, I simply cannot turn a blind eye to their unholy acts.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Great, it seems we've reached an agreement.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Beppe? Thank the Divinity, you're safe! But what happened to you?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Wait! Beppe... Oh...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Sorry, I got a bit carried away. Echoes don't usually act like this… Something must have startled them.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Is he praying? I know the Fisalias are extremely devout, but who is this "Queen" he mentioned?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: This prayer sounds... odd. It's definitely not from the Order's Codex.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Lord of Tides and... Riddles?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: You... What have you done to those Echoes!?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Mr. Gilberto, please explain this "Lord of Tides and Riddles" you mentioned.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Oh, forgive me...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: These Echoes... are converging towards the sea of clouds. What's happening?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: According to the Codex, Lorelei is a powerful Remnant creature residing in the Atrium of Reflections at the center of the Nimbus Sanctum.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Legends say the sea of clouds once flooded the Seminary of the Forgotten, reducing it to ruins, before spreading to Ragunna. It was Lorelei who curbed the raging clouds and ended the crisis.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: If... if they've really done something to Lorelei, then Mr. Gilberto wasn't just bluffing. The clouds might truly engulf Ragunna, leading to a disaster beyond our imagination.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I'll stay with you. After all, this could provoke outcry from the Fisalia family. If I testify about Gilberto's misdeeds on behalf of the Order, they can't deny the facts or exploit the situation.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Please be extra careful, {PlayerName}! May the Sentinel protect you!
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: No, we are not... Might you be Lorelei?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: No, that's impossible! The current Primus, Fenrico the Enlightened One, was given a direct oracle from the Sentinel. The Sentinel has always been with the people!
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Huh? I-I'm fine. I'm just… processing Lorelei's words. Forgive me, I… I need a moment to reflect.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I intend to return to the Order first. While I believe Lorelei is truthful, I can't imagine the Primus would deceive our people. He is, after all, the <ano=Sentinel's Resonator>Enlightened One</ano>.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: According to Lorelei, the Sentinel will deliver an oracle during the Carnevale. That's when the truth will come to light.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: No, only Lord Fenrico has ever directly communicated with the Sentinel. Previous Primuses were merely indirect representatives, not the Enlightened One...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Silence and composure are gifts from the great Imperator. I'll keep today's events between us, locked away in my heart.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The Codex reminds us, "It is not the lighthouse that guides us through the storm to safety, but our own eyes fixed on the shore."
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I'd like to offer these words to you—may your eyes always shine bright with clarity.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The martyrdom of the Blessed Maiden... Could this be the "Aria of the Blessed Maiden"? It's a chorale rarely used these days. I doubt most Priests even know of it.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: M-me?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: O-okay then. I suppose it's our best option at the moment. I'll give it a try. Ahem...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It's all thanks to {PlayerName}. {Male=He;Female=She} fulfilled C-MOSS's wish.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Just like us, C-MOSS wants to savor every moment of the Carnevale and leave with no regrets.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The Sentinel cherishes Their people, and as followers, we find joy in witnessing everyone's happiness.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: But we have our duties, ensuring order during the Carnevale. I'm sorry I can't join in the festivities.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I wish you a wonderful time at the Carnevale!
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Mmhmm, I see. You've done a great job—
Oh, {PlayerName} and Ms. Zani! Nice to see you again!
Oh, we're just chatting. They seemed lonely. Not many people talk to them.
Yes, it was supposed to be another Acolyte. But she's busy with the Order's work, so I volunteered.
Perhaps, Ms. Zani, but I'm sure she'd think differently if she met a Montelli employee like you.
Seeing as the Montelli family and the Order are both blessed by the Sentinel, our paths were bound to cross eventually.
Certainly, as you requested, the escorts carried an empty case while the relic stayed with me.
It's an important relic entrusted to the Montellis. That's all I know.
Should we ask for outside help?
That means there's no way out and no hope for backup...
So, aside from a handful of senior members of the Montelli family, no one knows the full layout of this vault?
Someone's hiding over there!
It looks like a letter sent to his grandson. And this paper... was it torn from a book?
I can make out a little. It seems connected to cryptography.
An Echo book? Incredible.
The train Echo!
Without us chasing him, he'll follow the main route and trigger fewer defense systems.
That should work. {PlayerName} and I will go retrieve the clearance. Ms. Lily, could you stay here and assist Ms. Zani?
It's finished. We can get the clearance now.
I'm fine, really. It's just like hauling the Codex around back at the Order... But, uh, {PlayerName}, why are you staring at me like that? Is something wrong?
Striking with an appropriate level of force clears the mind, enhancing one's purification.
Uh... I wasn't joking.
It's alright, Ms. Lily. May the Sentinel guide our way.
Phew... Is everyone alright?
Please wait... Ma'am, are you hurt?
"Somewhere very dark"... What kind of place could that be?
Ms. Zani, the book says the password is "0622," those numbers refer to...
Faith tells me that the truth you sought will eventually come to light, Ms. Lily.
Me? Oh, this Echo seems to have a headache. I'm trying to help.
Is something wrong, Ms. Zani?
What's a hidden security module? Is it like a key?
But what if that's exactly what they want?
Think about it. There's no one in the vault except for us, and all comms are blocked. It's the perfect opportunity for a thief.
Excuse me, ma'am, do you work here?
She doesn't look like she could be a thief's accomplice, either.
The Order's relics are kept a secret from everyone, including an Acolyte like myself. I can't say what it's reacting to.
But... I do have a strange feeling about Ms. Lily.
I understand your hesitation, but with the vault sealed, you'll be safer with us.
But... no one should be working in such awful conditions, Ms. Zani.
B-blessed Maiden!
...As it was in the beginning, and ever shall be.
Everyone has their tasks to do now... But in the future...
Rinascita's future...
Eh... but it's empty. Where is the recorded future?
...I see. Thank you, {PlayerName}!
Disaster recovery in Ragunna City is nearly complete. Thank you so much for your help, {PlayerName}.
Miss Galbrena? When she finished up here, I think I saw her heading to Margherita's Restaurant...
What do you make of the clues, {PlayerName}?
Good idea. The sailor may have vanished, but if his Gondola is still here we may be able to find some clues.
O lost souls adrift in surging tides, may your frequencies find peace. May my prayers accompany you back to the high heavens.
Yes. A sincere heart can surely pierce through the haze of the Dark Tide!
All the Acolytes dispatched are working tirelessly, but the situation remains grim...
Many of the faithful have come seeking aid from the Order. But even more arrive unsure if they can still trust us.
Another one? Very well, I'll take care of it right after I finish the list from Ragunna City.
We don't have extra hands to spare. I'll go to Septimont and handle the matter myself!
No, it's all right. I can take care of it.
...Very well. I'll send over the locations and requirements shortly. Thank you, truly.
You came across a "siren"? A creature with a human body and a fishtail?
lines.quest_name: Love in the Time of Fishing

lines.text: Could there be another being like Lorelei?
lines.quest_name: Love in the Time of Fishing

lines.text: I suspect that the fish we saw earlier is connected to this "siren."
lines.quest_name: Love in the Time of Fishing

lines.text: There's got to be a reason it stayed fresh after all these weeks.
lines.quest_name: Love in the Time of Fishing

lines.text: This means we need to think of a way to get that fish out of Mr. Starbuck's hands.
lines.quest_name: Love in the Time of Fishing

lines.text: Would that work?
lines.quest_name: Love in the Time of Fishing

lines.text: Well, only one way to find out.
lines.quest_name: Love in the Time of Fishing

lines.text: It says here, "Riccioli, shower Neptunia with your light. The usurper slumbers in the depths of Reyes. Offer your love to Reyes' descendants and the eternal life of the sea."
Riccioli corresponds to Neptunia in Rinascitan astrology. In other words, the island is surrounded by the deepest waters in all of Rinascita.
I'm just stating what everyone in Rinascita knows. It's also mentioned in the legends of the Sentinel Imperator.
I... I'm not sure.
The Tidebreaker...
Tidebreaker. I... I have something to ask you!
Have you fully recovered?
You were tricked and deceived during the Carnevale... I know that an Acolyte like me is in no position to represent the Order...
But I still wish to offer you an apology, Cetus the Tidebreaker, even if it's only my own.
I see. Thank you for telling me that!
Are they... laughing?
